command: for f in docs/README.md docs/guardrails.md docs/opencode.md docs/testing.md docs/migration.md docs/roadmap.md; do [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "Missing: $f"; exit 1; }; done; echo "All docs present."

checks.description: All OpenCode agents, commands, and skills exist
command:
for f in \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-coordinator.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-explorer.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-architect.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-toolsmith.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-gatekeeper.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-reviewer.md \
  .opencode/agents/phenix-simplifier.md \
  .opencode/commands/phenix-foundation.md \
  .opencode/commands/phenix-task.md \
  .opencode/skills/phenix-architecture/SKILL.md \
  .opencode/skills/phenix-tooling/SKILL.md; do \
  [ -f "$f" ] || { echo "Missing: $f"; exit 1; }; \
done; echo "All OpenCode config files present."

checks.description: Gate runner binary compiles and responds
